title: Minecraft Modern Warfare (MMW)
description: A first person shooter for Minecraft! Complete with guns, missiles and vehicles.
body:
## Archived
- Please note this Modpack has been archived, this means it is no longer actively maintained. Although the files are still likely to work, they will not be updated.

![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Minecraft_Modern_Warfare/BH_MMW_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Minecraft_Modern_Warfare/BH_MMW_promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Minecraft_Modern_Warfare/BH_MMW_overview.webp)
---
**Minecraft Modern Warfare (MMW)** is a modern focused modpack revolving around guns, artillery, missiles, vehicles and so much more! This modpack aims to add both fantasy and realistic weaponary to the game while offering players the ability to simulate the beloved FPS expierence. Whether its nuking a village, locking onto a player with a javelin or using some crazy sci-fi weapons, enjoy it all with this modpack.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/minecraft-modern-warfare)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minecraft-modern-warfare)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Minecraft_Modern_Warfare/BH_MMW_features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **Dynamic World** - Custom world generation with sprawling cliffs, dense forests, vast canyons and deeper oceans thanks to **Terralith**.
- [✔️] **Weaponry and Vehicles** - Better stay on the move, mortar rounds, tanks and more are all mass destruction weapons, thanks to **superbwarfare**.

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Minecraft_Modern_Warfare/BH_MMW_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
